summary: Iteration 10 verified end-to-end. Backend: GET /api/leaderboard returns 3 users (Yash Gavas 830XP Warrior #1, Test Developer 145XP Apprentice #2, sharanya 100XP Apprentice #3) sorted by xp desc with sequential positions; entry has all required fields (user_id,name,xp,rank,rank_color,problems_solved,interviews_completed,max_score,avg_score,position); 401 without session cookie. 10/10 pytest cases pass. Frontend: (1) Leaderboard at /leaderboard renders [data-testid=leaderboard-page] with [data-testid=my-rank-card] for current user (Test Developer #2) and 3 [data-testid=leaderboard-row-1|2|3] rows showing position icons (Crown/Medal), rank colors, XP, solved, interviews, best score with avg subscript. (2) Navbar shows 'Ranks' nav item ([data-testid=nav-ranks], href=/leaderboard, Trophy icon). (3) ProblemWorkspace (/problems/prob_00001) [data-testid=complexity-graph] now contains a 450x200 <canvas> element (verified painted via getImageData; no .bar div elements) instead of bar chart. (4) DSAVisualizer shows all 9 DS tabs (Array, Linked List, Binary Tree, Queue, Stack, Heap, Trie, Hash Map, Graph) - confirmed via screenshot; Queue/Heap/Trie/Hash Map all render Three.js canvases on click; Hash Map screenshot shows clear bucket array with key:value pairs (a:1..e:5 across [0]..[4] buckets and 'hash(key) % size' label). (5) README.md at /app/README.md contains full Docker setup (compose, backend Dockerfile, frontend Dockerfile), manual setup, env var table, and feature list including Leaderboard.
action_items: Carry-over from iter9: server.py is now ~1171 lines; modularize into routers (auth, problems, interviews, leaderboard, resources, community, profile).
Carry-over from iter8: streak calculation in /api/profile/stats queries interview_messages without user_id filter; latent bug.
Carry-over from iter8: THREE.Clock deprecation warning is still emitted by ThreeBackground/DSAVisualizer (visible in console). Migrate to THREE.Timer.

Performance nit (new): ComplexityGraph reads canvas every frame patterns lead to console warning 'Canvas2D: getImageData faster with willReadFrequently=true'. Pass {willReadFrequently:true} to getContext('2d') if you do readbacks; otherwise avoid the readback (it's only my test reading; library usage is fine).
Leaderboard scaling nit: /api/leaderboard does N+1 queries (4 per user: submissions, interviews, posts, reports). Fine for current 3 users; add aggregation pipeline if user count grows.
critical_code_review_comments: /api/leaderboard: per-user fan-out queries (submissions/interviews/posts/reports). Replace with a single aggregation pipeline using $lookup or precomputed counters on users collection (interviews_completed/problems_solved already stored - reuse them).
Leaderboard.jsx: useEffect deps [] but uses `user` indirectly via myEntry; add `user?.user_id` guard or include in deps to avoid stale highlights when auth restores after first paint.
Leaderboard.jsx: Best Score color thresholds (>=75 green, >=50 yellow) are hardcoded - centralize with rest of scoring constants.
DSAVisualizer.jsx parseHashMap/parseTrie: no validation against malformed input (e.g., 'a:' or empty tokens); silently produces empty arrays. Surface a small helper-text error in UI.

ProblemWorkspace.jsx ComplexityGraph: canvas width/height fixed at 450x200; on small/large screens it's CSS-stretched (w-full) which causes blurry text. Use devicePixelRatio scaling inside the effect.

README.md docker-compose.yml example uses MONGO_URL=mongodb://mongodb:27017 in env block AND env_file backend/.env which already has localhost MONGO_URL - the inline override works but is confusing; document precedence.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (Leaderboard page, nav-ranks, complexity canvas, 9 DS tabs incl. Queue/Heap/Trie/HashMap render)

test_credentials.users_in_leaderboard: Yash Gavas (#1, 830 XP, Warrior), Test Developer (#2, 145 XP, Apprentice), sharanya mavinaguni (#3, 100 XP, Apprentice)

seed_data_creation: None. Read-only verification against existing seeded users.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 10 fully verified. Tests in /app/backend/tests/test_iteration10.py cover /api/leaderboard (auth, fields, sort, position, expected users, xp formula bound, rank_color hex format) plus regression. Frontend data-testids confirmed: leaderboard-page, my-rank-card, leaderboard-row-{1..N}, nav-ranks (Trophy icon, href=/leaderboard), complexity-graph (now contains <canvas width=450 height=200>), main-navbar. DSAVisualizer has 9 DS_CONFIGS (array, linkedlist, binarytree, queue, stack, heap, trie, hashmap, graph); each renders a Three.js <canvas>. Hash Map renders bucket array nicely (verified visually). Visualizer DS tabs are buttons with text label + description; if writing playwright assertions, do NOT use exact textContent match - use button:has-text('Queue') style. Latent issues persist from iter8/9 (server.py size, streak query, THREE.Clock deprecation).
rca_of_the_issue: No bugs found in iteration 10. All requested features (leaderboard API+page, Ranks nav, canvas complexity graph, 4 new DS visualizers, README docker setup) work correctly.
